curation.synopsis: Picking up the tale after the founding of the Black Legion, Iskandar Khayon recounts how Ezekyle Abaddon fought to forge a single host from the warring renegades of the Eye of Terror. As Abaddon's most trusted assassin, Khayon is set against Thagus Daravek — the self-styled Lord of Hosts, a rival who claims the same dark destiny — yet every attempt on his life seems only to make him stronger. While Daravek bars his path at every turn, Abaddon's gaze fixes on a power that will set him on his fated road: out of the Eye, into the galaxy beyond, and toward a reckoning with an enemy long thought lost. Aaron Dembski-Bowden continues his Black Legion saga with a story of ambition, treachery, and the terrible will of the Despoiler.
